tasks_executed.detail: Wrapped bare json.loads() in try/except FileNotFoundError | JSONDecodeError. On failure: prints diagnostic message, creates default config.json with empty fields, then continues. Previously killed daemon before any logging.
Same fix applied to autopilot-continuous.py — was vulnerable to same crash on fresh clone or corrupted state.

tasks_executed.description: Remove dead gemini entry from autopilot-continuous.py RATE_LIMITS
tasks_executed.detail: Removed 'gemini': {...} from RATE_LIMITS dict. Gemini CLI is not installed on this system per memory. autopilot.py already removed it in e794bb2, but autopilot-continuous.py was not updated.

tasks_executed.description: Add disk persistence for RATE_LIMITS in autopilot-continuous.py
tasks_executed.detail: Added STATE_RATE_FILE = STATE / 'rate_limits.json', _load_rate_limits() (loads from disk with fallback to defaults), _save_rate_limits() (writes after every lock/unlock). RATE_LIMITS initialized from _load_rate_limits() at module load. mark_locked() and mark_available() both call _save_rate_limits() after mutation. Matching autopilot.py cooldowns.json pattern.

git.message: fix(crash): protect config loading, remove dead gemini entry, persist rate limits
